debug_info.goal:
H : Type u_1
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝¹ : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝ : CompleteSpace H
a : H →L[ℂ] H
ha : IsSelfAdjoint a
x y : H
f : C(↑(spectrum ℂ a), ℂ)
⊢ ‖ComplexMeasure.integral (@cfc_toComplexMeasure H inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ a ha x y) ⇑f‖ ≤ ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖

failed_attempts:
have h₁ := ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_norm_bound
    (compSL C₀((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) ℂ _ _
      (cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y)
      (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE

  simp only [cfc_toComplexMeasure, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply,
    ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.coeFn_liftZeroAtInftyCLE] at h₁
  calc
    ‖(cfc_toComplexMeasure ha x y).integral f‖
      = ‖(cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y) f‖ := by rw [ComplexRMK.rieszMeasure_integral_apply]
    _ ≤ ‖cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y‖ * ‖f‖ := ContinuousLinearMap.le_opNorm _
    _ ≤ (‖x‖ * ‖y‖) * ‖f‖ := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (cfc_toLinearFunctional_bound ha x y) (norm_nonneg f)
    _ = ‖x‖ * ‖y‖ * ‖f‖ := by ring

        ≤ ‖compSL C₀((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) C((spectrum ℂ a), ℂ) ℂ _ _ (cfc_toLinearFunctional ha x y)
            (@ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap.ContinuousMap.liftZeroAtInftyCLE (spectrum ℂ a) ℂ ℂ _ _ _ _ _ _).symm.toContinuousLinearMap‖ * ‖f‖ := h₁
